## 📝 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of the numerical anomaly or runtime crash encountered within the SO-HMNS framework.

## 💻 Minimal Reproducible Example
Please provide a minimal snippet of Python code demonstrating the issue using `sohmns/core.py`.

```python
# Paste your code here
```

## 🚨 Stack Trace / Error Output
If applicable, paste the exact terminal output or PyTorch runtime exception trace here.

```text
# Paste error logs here
```
